figure.title: 64-byte TL Flit Mirrored View - Lower Sectors (Duplicate)
figure.purpose: Illustrates the detailed bit-to-byte mapping for the lower sectors of a 64-byte TL Flit (identical to Figure 6-t).

technical_summary: This diagram focuses on the mapping of the 64-byte TL Flit's logical message bits into physical sectors S0 through S31.
Lines trace the logical bits from 'M0', 'M1', etc., to specific byte addresses (e.g., S0.B0, S0.B3) in the mirrored view layout.
This appears to be a duplicate image within the source document.

packet_layout.description: Lower sectors of the TL flit data block.

critical_facts: Duplicate of the mapping diagram for the lower sector addresses.
